title: JV-16 - Soak and performance gate for realtime local MT with Zoom co-run budgets

labels.name: priority:P0
labels.description: Must-have for the first usable product increment

labels.name: level: atomic
labels.description: Small independent execution slice that can be assigned directly

body:
## Summary

Prove local MT remains realtime and stable during long-running subtitle sessions.

## Why is this needed?

Passing a sentence benchmark is not enough. The app must stay crash-free with Zoom, local STT, local MT, TUI, and storage running.

## Current context

This WBS comes from tentacle research on 2026-05-21. Current repo state: mt_provider still defaults to google; src/bin/mt_bench.rs emits a pending lf-04-v1 fixture; local OPUS-MT provider exists behind local-mt but lacks benchmark-proven realtime replacement evidence; config has explicit mt_cloud_fallback consent; #372 closed with routing/fixture only; #383 tracks 60fps render performance; PR #407 aligns docs with local-first STT but does not make local MT default.

## Inputs

- Local provider from JV-11.
- Runtime routing from JV-12.
- Existing soak runner and metrics.
- Reference hardware profile.

## Outputs

- 30-minute or longer soak artifact for mt_provider=local.
- RSS growth, CPU, capture drops, MT latency, subtitle pair count, and error/fallback counts.
- nfr-verification-gate and tui-soak-monitor verdicts.

## Implementation approach

- Run with file audio source or controlled Zoom-like fixture where possible.
- Track p95/p99 MT and end-to-end latency, RSS growth, CPU, dropped chunks, dropped subtitles, and model reloads.
- Fail on panics, OOM, unbounded RSS, or silent Google fallback.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] 0 panics/crashes.
- [ ] RSS growth <= 20MB after warmup or justified threshold.
- [ ] 0 capture-thread drops attributable to MT.
- [ ] p95 MT latency and RTF meet JV-08 thresholds.
- [ ] No cloud request unless fallback consent scenario is explicitly under test.

## Test cases / evidence gates

- [ ] tui-soak-monitor report.
- [ ] metrics snapshot assertions.
- [ ] Crash dump/Event Viewer check if failure occurs.
- [ ] Comparison run with Google baseline if needed.

## Dependencies

- Depends on JV-11, JV-12, JV-14.
- Blocks JV-13 and release candidate.

## Agent routing

tui-soak-monitor plus nfr-verification-gate; crash-root-cause if failure occurs.

## Project / WBS

- WBS key: JV-16
- Wave: V2 soak
- Project target: magicpro97/project/2
- Labels: type: testing, area: performance, area: reliability, area: verification, priority:P0, level: atomic

## Duplicate / extension note

New local-MT soak gate; complements existing audio/Whisper soak work.
